_schema_description: Script Safety Guard 结构化报告示例。每次工具调用经过安全扫描后产出一份此报告。

_field_descriptions.invocation_id: 本次调用的唯一标识（UUID），用于关联审计日志
_field_descriptions.language: 脚本语言类型，如 python / bash / javascript
_field_descriptions.decision: 最终决策：allow（放行）| deny（拦截）| needs_human_review（需人工审批）
_field_descriptions.risk_level: 综合风险等级：none | low | medium | high | critical
_field_descriptions.is_blocked: 是否实际阻断了执行（deny 时为 true）
_field_descriptions.findings[].rule_id: 触发的规则 ID，对应 policy 中的规则定义
_field_descriptions.findings[].risk_category: 风险分类：process | filesystem | network | secret | resource | dependency
_field_descriptions.findings[].severity: 该条发现的严重程度：low | medium | high | critical
_field_descriptions.findings[].confidence: 置信度 0.0~1.0，静态匹配为 1.0，启发式匹配 < 1.0
_field_descriptions.findings[].evidence: 触发的关键证据（函数名、模式等）

findings.description: Subprocess call with non-static command: os.system
findings.recommendation: Ensure the executed command is safe and expected.

findings.description: Shell injection risk: os.system executes commands through shell
findings.recommendation: Use subprocess.run([...]) with shell=False for safer execution.

findings.description: Code injection risk: eval() allows arbitrary code execution
findings.recommendation: Avoid eval/exec. Use safer alternatives for dynamic behavior.
